issues.detail: The skill file lists specific agents, indicating minor platform assumptions.

scenarios.name: Animated stats counter section with shimmer CTA
scenarios.rationale: Treatment installs the right components via npx magicui-cli add number-ticker and shimmer-button, imports them from @/components/magicui/*, and uses NumberTicker value and ShimmerButton shimmerColor/shimmerDuration/background props as documented; baseline writes a hand-rolled counter and gradient button without the Magic UI CLI workflow.

scenarios.name: Hero with ripple background, blur-in headline, and marquee logos
scenarios.rationale: Treatment composes Ripple (mainCircleSize, numCircles), BlurIn (word, duration), and Marquee with [--duration:Xs] CSS variable plus pauseOnHover from the documented full landing page pattern; baseline writes generic Framer Motion/CSS animations and misses the CLI install plus the documented prop names.
